utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required items in format: 6 items (destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget) → actually 7 items. Final package includes: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, total_budget, additional_services → 7 present. Now check full specification requirements:
- destination: specified (OK).
- travel_dates: specified (OK), but mismatch with 5-day? Listed May 15–19 (5 days, but accommodation says 5 nights—minor inconsistency but dates are present).
- transportation: should be flight details with costs. Provided: type, departure city, cost says “Included in package” (no actual cost; no flight details like times/airline). Not fully specified (FAIL).
- accommodation: should be hotel selection with costs. Provided hotel name, nights, cost “Included in package” (no price). Not fully specified (FAIL).
- activities: selected activities with costs. Provided list but no costs. Not fully specified (FAIL).
- additional_services: any extra services with costs. Provided deposit (€501) and remaining balance due date (no amount). Partial; at least one cost present, but lacks clarity; still considered includes costs for some extra service, so minimally specified (OK).
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown. Provided single total “€1,670” without breakdown. Requirement says complete cost breakdown, so not fully specified (FAIL).
Thus, fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, additional_services (minimally meets cost inclusion). Count = 3/7.
